diagrams.title: Dynamic Stack Growth Pattern
diagrams.description: Shows how capacity increases as elements are pushed, demonstrating the doubling strategy
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how the dynamic array grows geometrically and understand when resizing occurs

diagrams.title: Amortized Cost Distribution
diagrams.description: Bar chart showing actual cost per operation - most operations cost $1, rare resize operations cost O(n)
elements: Aggregate over n operations averages to O(1)
diagrams.purpose: Understand why amortized O(1) works despite occasional expensive operations

diagrams.title: Stack Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Contiguous memory representation showing stack array, top index, and capacity
elements: Comparison with linked list scattered nodes
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate contiguous memory advantage for cache performance
